positive: An abstract, minimalist woodland scene featuring stylized, intersecting geometric flora and fauna silhouettes against a deep indigo night sky. The composition is centered and symmetrical, showcasing branching patterns of stylized oak leaves and luna moth wings. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of matte gold, cream off-white, and deep navy blue. The style should be intricate linework combined with clean negative space, suitable for screen printing on fabric. High detail, bold outlines, symmetrical composition, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy lines, cluttered, low detail, photographic, bokeh
